name: Hermes Agent
description: One Hermes profile. Athena is the active persona; the other 13 (Poseidon, Icarus, Forge, Argus, Heracles, Recovery, office team) load as Hermes skills that Athena dispatches via cron + Paperclip. Self-improving runtime — Hermes creates new skills from experience.
notes: Hermes routes all LLM calls through OpenRouter by default (one key, many models).
Workspace .md files (SOUL/IDENTITY/AGENTS/MEMORY/CURRENT/HEARTBEAT/CLAUDE) live at ~/.hermes/workspaces/<agent>/ and are referenced from cli-config.yaml as system_prompt sources.
Multi-persona topology: Athena is the active Hermes profile. Other 13 personas exist as workspace dirs the active Athena profile can load via skills/dispatch and cron.
For full 14-channel multi-agent topology, use the OpenClaw runtime instead — Hermes is single-profile by design.
